name: Fraktal Analytics
description: Privacy-respecting, self-hosted web analytics. Daily-salted hashing, no cookies, DNT respect, JSONL logs.
author: Fraktal
usageInstructions: Copy to src/modules/analytics/. Add <Analytics siteId='your-site' /> before </body> in layout. For SSR: create src/pages/api/analytics/track.ts using handleTrackRequest from lib/analytics-api.ts.
